title: Spell Components and Casting
description: Physical and temporal requirements for casting spells

casting_time.description: Specifies the time required to cast a spell

magic_action.description: Most spells require the Magic action to cast
magic_action.duration: Part of your action on your turn

bonus_action.description: Some spells can be cast as a Bonus Action
bonus_action.duration: Quick casting using your bonus action
bonus_action.trigger_based: Some bonus action spells are cast in response to specific triggers

reaction.description: Cast in response to a specific trigger
reaction.duration: Immediate response to the triggering event
reaction.trigger_requirement: Must meet the specific trigger defined in the spell

longer_times.description: Some spells require minutes or hours to cast

mechanics.action_requirement: Must take the Magic action on each of your turns
mechanics.failure_condition: If Concentration is broken, the spell fails but no spell slot is expended
mechanics.restart_requirement: Must start over if the casting is interrupted

casting_time.one_slot_per_turn_rule: On a turn, you can expend only one spell slot to cast a spell

range.description: How far from the spellcaster the spell's effect can originate

distance.description: The range is expressed in feet

touch.description: Must touch something within your reach
touch.mechanics: The spell's effect originates on the touched target

self.description: Cast on the spellcaster or emanates from them
self.mechanics: Caster is the origin point of the spell

range.movable_effects: If a spell has movable effects, they aren't restricted by its range unless stated otherwise

components.description: Physical requirements the spellcaster must meet to cast the spell

requirements.voice: Must be uttered in a normal speaking voice
requirements.freedom: Cannot be gagged or in an area of magical silence

mechanics.power_source: The specific combination of sounds, pitch, and resonance sets threads of magic in motion
mechanics.meaningless: The words sound like nonsense to the uninitiated

creation_method.description: Optional method for creating verbal components
steps: Take the name of the spell
Keep only one instance of each letter

somatic.description: A forceful gesticulation or an intricate set of gestures

requirements.hands: Must use at least one hand to perform these movements
requirements.freedom: Hand must be free to gesture

material.description: A particular material used in the spell's casting

requirements.specification: Materials are specified in parentheses in the Components entry
requirements.consumption: Materials aren't consumed unless the spell's description states otherwise
requirements.hand_requirement: Must have a hand free to access materials

component_pouch.description: Can substitute for materials without specific cost
component_pouch.requirement: Must have a hand free to reach into the pouch

spellcasting_focus.description: Can substitute if the caster has a feature allowing it
spellcasting_focus.requirement: Must hold the focus unless its description says otherwise

substitutions.same_hand: The hand used for materials can be the same used for Somatic components

components.failure_condition: If the spellcaster can't provide one or more components, the spell cannot be cast

duration.description: The length of time the spell persists after it is cast

concentration.description: Requires ongoing mental focus to maintain
concentration.mechanics: Follows the Concentration rules in the Rules Glossary

instantaneous.description: The spell's magic appears only for a moment
instantaneous.mechanics: Effects happen immediately and then the magic disappears

time_span.description: Specifies how long the spell lasts
time_span.dismissal: While ongoing, you can dismiss it (no action required) if you don't have the Incapacitated condition
